curation_notes: Patch modifies only openssl/src/cms.rs (1 source file). The vulnerability is in the sign() function where MemBioSlice::new(data)?.as_ptr() creates a temporary MemBioSlice that is immediately dropped, leaving a dangling pointer passed to ffi::CMS_sign. The fix binds the MemBioSlice to a local variable to extend its lifetime. Pre-assigned class use-after-free (CWE-416) is correct — the patch directly addresses a dropped temporary whose pointer is used after deallocation. No sibling files exhibit the same pattern.
